action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

In addition to common actions, you can onser, mellum, clogery, ellous, ially and upbes.

Your goal for this game is: Make the hetle anird, the ioness opige and the rotont reforian.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a atival now. There are a fervan, a thium, a rotont, a equadish, a herper and a ioness. There is a passage to a routiced here.
action.label: context

action.content: You can't see a hetle here.
action.label: context

action.content: > onser equadish> ellous fervan> upbes equadish> ellous hetle> mellum fervan> ially hetle
action.label: response

content.arg:

onser equadish> ellous fervan> upbes equadish> ellous

	* __ANON_0

action.content: I don't know what you mean.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a routiced now. There are a venism and a attle. There are passages to a atival and a guaced here.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a guaced now. There is a toxist. There are passages to a emingly and a routiced here.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a emingly now. There is a hetle. There is a passage to a guaced here.
action.label: context
